reviews.comment:
Bien buena atención lo único malo es que estuve más de 40 minutos esperando porque estaban descargando combustible el playero que además estaba solo después baños limpios afuera y.para socios adentro joya

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the only downside was that I waited over 40 minutes because they were unloading fuel. The attendant was working alone. After that, the restrooms outside were clean, and the ones inside were for members. Great!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLZ04zTWl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños están cerrados porque estan muy sucios y no hay personal de limpieza. No funciona el sistema para cargar puntos de ypf serviclub. A las 9 de la mañana aun esta cerrada la confitería. Pésimo

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are closed because they're filthy and there's no cleaning staff. The YPF Serviclub points system isn't working. The café was still closed at 9:00 AM. Terrible.

(Translated by Google)
Bathrooms in terrible condition, lack of hygiene, no COVID protocols, no soap or sanitizing supplies. A disgrace for YPF and the ACA.
